meta.description: 15 Nepal-specific skin conditions. Each follows the flow: what it is (plain language) → causes (Nepal lifestyle/weather/habits) → symptoms (how you know you have it) → fix (diet first, habits second, ayurveda third, products/medicine last). References content_database condition IDs C001–C007 and adds C008–C015.
meta.philosophy: Lifestyle and diet are the root fix. Ayurveda and home remedies are the primary treatment. Chemical products are the last resort.

conditions.prevalence_nepal: Most common skin problem reported in Nepal — affects 8 out of 10 teenagers and many adults in cities
conditions.description_en: Red or white bumps on your face, mostly on forehead, nose, and chin. Sometimes painful. Can leave dark marks after they heal. Root causes in Nepal often include Excess sugar (chiya with 3 spoons sugar, cold drinks, mithai) — spikes insulin → tells glands to make more oil, Kathmandu's PM2.5 pollution clogs pores with particles 30x smaller than a pore opening, and Using bar soap on face — too alkaline, destroys skin's protective barrier.
conditions.description_ne: Red or white bumps on your face, mostly on forehead, nose, and chin. Sometimes painful. Can leave dark marks after they heal.

types_simple.blackheads: Open pore clogged with oxidised oil — turns black from air. Not dirt.
types_simple.whiteheads: Closed pore clogged with oil and dead skin. White/flesh coloured.
types_simple.papules: Red inflamed bumps without pus. Painful.
types_simple.pustules: Red bumps WITH yellow or white pus on top.
types_simple.cysts: Deep painful lumps under skin. Leaves worst scars. See a doctor.

conditions.when_to_see_doctor: Deep painful cysts (feel hard lumps under skin) | Acne covering chest and back in addition to face | No improvement after 3 months of consistent care | Acne accompanied by excess facial hair growth or irregular periods (may be PCOS)

conditions.prevalence_nepal: Extremely common in Nepal — high altitude means 25–30% stronger UV than at sea level. Post-acne marks affect nearly everyone who has had acne.
conditions.description_en: Dark patches or spots on your face — darker than your normal skin colour. Can appear after pimples heal, from sun exposure, or in patches (melasma). Root causes in Nepal often include Iron deficiency — very common in Nepali women, makes skin look grey and dull overall, Nepal's altitude: every 1000m above sea level adds 10–12% UV intensity. Kathmandu at 1300m = 13–16% stronger UV than plains., and Using 'fairness creams' with undisclosed steroids — these thin skin and rebound with worse pigmentation.
conditions.description_ne: Dark patches or spots on your face — darker than your normal skin colour. Can appear after pimples heal, from sun exposure, or in patches (melasma).

morning.action: Habit: SUNSCREEN EVERY MORNING — SPF 30 minimum, SPF 50 preferred at Nepal's altitude. Even indoors — UV comes through windows.

types_simple.post_acne_marks: Dark flat spots exactly where pimples were. Most common. Fade in 3–6 months with treatment.
types_simple.sun_spots: Small dark spots from repeated sun exposure — usually on cheeks and forehead.
types_simple.melasma: Large symmetrical dark patches. Hormonal trigger. Takes longer to treat. See doctor.
types_simple.dark_circles: Blue-purple under eyes. Usually iron deficiency or genetics, not sun.

conditions.when_to_see_doctor: Melasma (large symmetrical patches across cheeks) — needs prescription treatment | Spots that are raised, itchy, or change shape — could be something else | No improvement after 6 months of SPF + consistent care

conditions.prevalence_nepal: Very common in Kathmandu winter (Poush-Magh) and in hilly regions year-round. Affects most people but rarely treated seriously.
conditions.description_en: Skin feels tight, rough, or scratchy. White flakes or dry patches — especially on cheeks, around nose, or eyebrows. Worse in winter. Humidity can drop to 30% in Poush-Magh., and Skipping moisturiser thinking oily skin doesn't need it — everyone needs moisture, oiliness and dryness are separate.

weather_rules.trigger_en: UV is very high today (common in Nepal, March-September)
weather_rules.tip_en: Reapply sunscreen every 2 hours. Wear a hat or dupatta when stepping out.
weather_rules.tip_ne: हरेक २ घण्टामा सनस्क्रिन फेरि लगाउनुस्। बाहिर जाँदा टोपी लगाउनुस्।

weather_rules.trigger_en: Air is dry today (common in winter hills/Kathmandu)
weather_rules.tip_en: Add a hydrating mist or facial oil step. Your skin will feel tighter than usual.
weather_rules.tip_ne: हाइड्रेटिङ मिस्ट वा फेशियल अयल थप्नुस्। आज छाला झन् टाइट लाग्नेछ।

weather_rules.tip_en: Switch to lighter moisturizer today. Focus on double cleansing at night — monsoon humidity traps more pollutants.
weather_rules.tip_ne: आज हल्को मोइस्चराइजर प्रयोग गर्नुस्। रातको डबल क्लिन्जिङमा ध्यान दिनुस्।

weather_rules.trigger_en: Poor air quality (common in Kathmandu winter)
weather_rules.tip_en: Wear N95 mask outdoors and DOUBLE CLEANSE tonight without fail. Pollution particles accelerate skin aging by 300%.
weather_rules.tip_ne: बाहिर N95 मास्क लगाउनुस् र आज राति डबल क्लिन्ज अनिवार्य गर्नुस्। प्रदूषणले छाला बुढ्यौलो ३ गुणा छिटो बनाउँछ।

seasonal_rules.universal_tip_en: Switch everyone to heavier moisturizers in winter. Kathmandu humidity drops below 40%. Add facial oil as last step.
seasonal_rules.universal_tip_ne: जाडोमा सबैले बाक्लो मोइस्चराइजर प्रयोग गर्नुस्। अन्तिम चरणमा फेशियल अयल थप्नुस्।

seasonal_rules.universal_tip_en: UV rises sharply in Spring. Upgrade to SPF 50 now. Peak melasma and tanning season.
seasonal_rules.universal_tip_ne: वसन्तमा UV एक्कासि बढ्छ। SPF 50 मा अपग्रेड गर्नुस्। मेलाज्मा र ट्यानिङको शिखर मौसम।

seasonal_rules.universal_tip_en: Fungal infections and acne spike in monsoon. Switch to lighter products. Never go to bed with wet hair against face.
seasonal_rules.universal_tip_ne: मनसुनमा फंगल संक्रमण र मुहासो बढ्छ। हल्का प्रोडक्टमा स्विच गर्नुस्। ओसिलो कपाल मुखमा राखी नसुत्नुस्।

seasonal_rules.universal_tip_en: Dashain-Tihar season — rich food, late nights, increased pollution from fireworks. Pre-emptively double cleanse and increase water intake.
seasonal_rules.universal_tip_ne: दशैँ-तिहार — तेलिलो खाना, ढिलो रात, आतिशबाजीको धुवाँ। पहिल्यैदेखि डबल क्लिन्ज र पानी धेरै पिउनुस्।

lifestyle_alerts.alert_en: You slept under 5 hours. Your skin repairs at night — 2+ bad nights in a row will show as dullness and puffiness. Try to sleep by 10:30pm.
lifestyle_alerts.alert_ne: ५ घण्टाभन्दा कम निद्रा। छाला रातमा मर्मत हुन्छ — लगातार दुई रात कम निद्राले थकान र पफिनेस देखाउँछ।

lifestyle_alerts.alert_en: Drinking under 1L today? Dehydration is the fastest way to dull, tired-looking skin. Aim for 2.5L.
lifestyle_alerts.alert_ne: १ लिटरभन्दा कम पानी? निर्जलीकरण छालालाई सबैभन्दा छिटो निस्तेज बनाउँछ। २.५ लिटर लक्ष्य राख्नुस्।

lifestyle_alerts.alert_en: High stress = high cortisol = more oil + inflammation = breakouts. Take 5 minutes today for deep breathing. Seriously.
lifestyle_alerts.alert_ne: उच्च तनाव = उच्च कोर्टिसोल = बढी तेल + सूजन = मुहासो। आज ५ मिनेट गहिरो श्वासप्रश्वास गर्नुस्।

nepal_special_events.tip_en: Festival season: Increase water intake, maintain double cleansing despite busy schedule, avoid touching face during celebrations.
nepal_special_events.tip_ne: चाड मौसम: पानी बढाउनुस्, व्यस्त भए पनि डबल क्लिन्ज गर्नुस्, उत्सवमा मुहा छुन नदिनुस्।

nepal_special_events.tip_en: Holi colors contain heavy metals. Apply a thick layer of coconut oil before playing Holi to protect skin. Cleanse gently multiple times after.
nepal_special_events.tip_ne: होलीको रङमा भारी धातु हुन्छ। खेल्नुअघि नरिवल तेलको बाक्लो परत लगाउनुस्। पछि बिस्तारै धेरैपटक सफा गर्नुस्।

quiz_to_condition_matching_logic.note: Quiz answers map to condition IDs. Multiple conditions can match one quiz result. See quiz_triggers on each condition.
